author: claude
content: VERIFIED — Copilot is WRONG here; do NOT apply the 27->26 change (it would introduce an error). Rigorous net-count of PR #1140's diff: 33 distinct set_preference names removed, 7 re-added (typo-fix browser.safebrowsing.phising->phishing + reorders), = 27 NET removed prefs. The body prose ('Remove 27 Firefox preferences') is CORRECT. The real discrepancy Copilot noticed is internal to the body: the prose says 27 but the category breakdown sums to 26 -> one removed pref is missing from a category. FIX = add the missing pref to its category so the breakdown sums to 27 (NOT change the prose to 26). Recommend: rebut the Copilot thread with the net-count evidence + fix the category breakdown. (Lesson: the naive grep of removed set_preference lines gives 33; net-of-readded gives 27; trusting Copilot's 26 was wrong.) Leaving the actual rebuttal/edit for Stefan — it's his ready PR + reverses earlier guidance.
